notes: Desktop unit — no rack-unit designation; Roland specs list dimensions as 356×221×96 mm with no RU rating. TALLY/GPI physical connector is DB-25 Female (12 tally outputs, 8 GPI), which has no exact match in the connector enum; mapped to rs485 as the closest multi-pin control-signal type — treat as approximate. RS-232 uses a DB-9 Male physical connector; mapped to rs232. AUDIO IN 1–4 are combo XLR/TRS jacks (xlr3 primary, accepts trs-6.35). HDMI IN 6 and RGB/COMPONENT IN 6 share the same physical input (HDMI Type A and HD DB-15 are on the same input slot). Power is supplied via included PSB-7U AC adapter (DC barrel); no IEC inlet on the unit itself.
